Rental accounting

Track paid, due, and overdue rent with clearer portfolio visibility

OASIS gives landlords finance views built around rental operations, helping you understand income status, overdue balances, and where action is needed across the portfolio.

Landlord pain points

Rental finance gets harder when records are spread across manual trackers

Many landlords can see the numbers eventually, but only after too much checking, reconciling, and digging through separate records.

Unclear cash position

It takes too long to confirm what has been paid, what is due soon, and what is already overdue.

Weak portfolio visibility

Without one financial view, it is harder to see which tenants or properties need immediate attention.

Too much manual reporting

Landlords often rely on spreadsheets and notes to build the same summary over and over again.

How OASIS helps

Finance visibility designed around rental operations, not generic bookkeeping

OASIS helps landlords see the rental numbers that matter most day to day, with finance views connected to tenants, properties, and payment status.

See payment status clearly

Track paid, due, and overdue income in a format that matches how rental portfolios are actually managed.

Follow issues faster

Identify overdue balances and focus follow-up where it will have the most operational impact.

Connect finance to the wider workflow

Keep rent visibility tied to tenant and property context instead of isolated from the rest of the system.

What landlords gain with better rental accounting visibility

Cleaner oversight

Understand portfolio income status faster without rebuilding the same reports manually.

Better follow-up decisions

Know where overdue balances sit and where action is needed most urgently.

Less spreadsheet dependency

Move away from disconnected trackers toward a more usable operating view.

Stronger confidence in the numbers

Review rental income with the context landlords need to act quickly and stay organized.

Get clearer rental finance visibility across your portfolio

See how OASIS helps landlords track rental income, overdue balances, and payment status in one place.
